title: Not Enough Tools And Armor
description: A Minecraft mod that adds tools and armor for almost every block in the game!
body:
This mod is a very large mod, atleast in the long run. This mods adds a set of tool and armor for each block and with the ability of changing the handle texture. 
DISCLAIMER!
This mod is still in early alpha and could have major changes that could break other mods or world with an update.
Also for the moment please use /give to give yourself the item.

Also here is our discord!
[Discord Link!](https://discord.gg/ERHxV6TnaG)
